title: eupatorium dibollii
intro: Eupatorium dibollii, also known as the Dwarf Thoroughwort or Eupatorium, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family, native to the southeastern United States. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Eupatorium dibollii are attributed to its ability to relieve symptoms of fever, pain, and respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Eupatorium dibollii can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
